title: lichen_l2.c: LICHEN_MIN_FRAME_LEN defined inside function body
description:
Location: lichen_l2.c:518

The macro LICHEN_MIN_FRAME_LEN is defined inside lichen_l2_input() using #define, which is unusual placement for a constant.

What goes wrong: Reader expects #defines at file scope. When scanning the file for constants, this one is invisible. Harder to audit the frame format logic when the relevant constant is buried mid-function.

Suggested fix: Move to file scope near MAX_LORA_FRAME (line 40) with a comment explaining derivation: length(1) + flags(1) + src_eui64(8) + mic(4) = 14.
close_reason: Fixed: Moved LICHEN_MIN_FRAME_LEN from inside lichen_l2_input() to file scope near MAX_LORA_FRAME, with comment explaining derivation
